mapper.insert: INSERT INTO woorido.meetings ( id, challenge_id, title, description, location, location_detail, meeting_date, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{challengeId}, #{title}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{location,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{locationDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{meetingDate}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT m.id as MEETING_ID, m.challenge_id as CHALLENGE_ID, m.title as TITLE, m.description as DESCRIPTION, m.status as STATUS, m.meeting_date as MEETING_DATE, m.location as LOCATION, m.location_detail as LOCATION_DETAIL, m.created_at as CREATED_AT, m.created_by as CREATOR_ID, (SELECT u.nickname FROM woorido.users u WHERE u.id = m.created_by) as CREATOR_NICKNAME, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.meeting_votes mv JOIN woorido.meeting_vote_records mvr ON mv.id = mvr.meeting_vote_id WHERE mv.meeting_id = m.id AND mvr.choice = 'AGREE') as CONFIRMED_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.meeting_votes mv JOIN woorido.meeting_vote_records mvr ON mv.id = mvr.meeting_vote_id WHERE mv.meeting_id = m.id AND mvr.choice = 'DISAGREE') as DECLINED_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.meeting_votes mv JOIN woorido.meeting_vote_records mvr ON mv.id = mvr.meeting_vote_id WHERE mv.meeting_id = m.id AND mvr.choice = 'PENDING') as PENDING_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.challenge_members cm WHERE cm.challenge_id = m.challenge_id AND cm.privilege_status = 'ACTIVE') as TOTAL_MEMBERS FROM woorido.meetings m WHERE m.id = #{meetingId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.meeting_votes mv JOIN woorido.meeting_vote_records mvr ON mv.id = mvr.meeting_vote_id WHERE mv.meeting_id = #{meetingId} AND mvr.choice = 'AGREE'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.meeting_votes mv JOIN woorido.meeting_vote_records mvr ON mv.id = mvr.meeting_vote_id JOIN woorido.meetings m ON m.id = mv.meeting_id WHERE mv.meeting_id = #{meetingId} AND m.status = 'COMPLETED' AND mvr.actual_attendance = 'ATTENDED'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.meeting_votes mv JOIN woorido.meeting_vote_records mvr ON mv.id = mvr.meeting_vote_id JOIN woorido.meetings m ON m.id = mv.meeting_id WHERE mv.meeting_id = #{meetingId} AND mvr.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 'COMPLETED' AND mvr.actual_attendance = 'ATTENDED'

SELECT u.id as USER_ID, u.nickname as NICKNAME, u.profile_image_url as PROFILE_IMAGE, mvr.attendance_confirmed_at as JOINED_AT FROM woorido.meeting_votes mv JOIN woorido.meeting_vote_records mvr ON mv.id = mvr.meeting_vote_id JOIN woorido.users u ON mvr.user_id = u.id WHERE mv.meeting_id = #{meetingId} AND mvr.choice = 'AGREE' ORDER BY mvr.attendance_confirmed_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM woorido.meetings WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND status = 'COMPLETED' AND completed_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) FROM woorido.meetings m JOIN woorido.meeting_votes mv ON mv.meeting_id = m.id JOIN woorido.meeting_vote_records mvr ON mvr.meeting_vote_id = mv.id WHERE m.challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND m.status = 'COMPLETED' AND m.completed_at IS NOT NULL AND mvr.user_id = #{userId} AND mvr.actual_attendance = 'ATTENDED'
